name: YAML config with stale references and unit mismatch

planted_issues.description: legacy_auth_service points to auth-v1.internal, which was decommissioned when the team migrated to OAuth2. The service no longer resolves in DNS, so any code path that falls back to legacy auth will fail at runtime.
timeout is set to 30 (intended as seconds) but the consuming code reads it as milliseconds, resulting in a 0.03-second timeout. This causes spurious timeouts under normal load, masked by retry logic.
enable_feature_x is set to true but the feature_x code was removed from the codebase 6 months ago. This is dead config that misleads operators into thinking the feature is active.

clean_areas.description: The database connection config section uses appropriate values: SSL enabled, reasonable pool size, proper timeout in milliseconds.
